title: Authors and Citation
text: Macartan Humphreys. Author. Vermon Washington. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Humphreys M, Washington V (2026). replicateEverything: Tools Replicate Empirical Research Papers. R package version 0.2.0, https://github.com/replicate-anything/replicateEverything.
code: @Manual{,   title = {replicateEverything: Tools to Replicate Empirical Research Papers},   author = {Macartan Humphreys and Vermon Washington},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.2.0},   url = {https://github.com/replicate-anything/replicateEverything}, }

title: replicateEverything
text: package reproducing academic research results programmatically simply. package allows users reproduce figures tables academic papers using standardized way structuring replication repository special way adding registry. goal make research transparent, modular, easily reproducible.

title: replicateEverything
text: replicateEverything provides simple interface : search replication-ready papers retrieve replication repositories reproduce figures tables run full paper replications system built around registry architecture replication repositories indexed accessed dynamically, making easier academics papers replicated one line code.

title: replicateEverything
text: inspiration create package came idea Macartan Humphreys, Director Institutions Political Inequality Research Group WZB talk gave Lab2Lab^2 audience 2024. project active development moment. feedback welcome. Feel free email Macartan.

title: replicateEverything
text: registry indexes replication repositories. See example entry:
code: "doi": "10.1257/aer.20221688",     "title": "Market Design and Moral Behavior",     "authors": ["Bartling", "Fehr"],     "year": 2024,     "journal": "American Economic Review",     "repo": "replicate-anything/aer-replications"

title: replicateEverything
text: Every replication repository MUST follows standardized structure. data must store processed folder. code must stored code folder.
code: papers/    DOI/       replication.yml       data/          fig_1.csv          tab_1.csv       code/          fig_1.R          tab_1.R

title: replicateEverything
text: See example structure repo single figure. similarly work single table well. repo data code seen .
code: papers/    10.1177/00491241211036161/       replication.yml       data/          fig_1.csv       code/          fig_1.R

title: replicateEverything
text: paper must include metadata file.

title: replicateEverything
text: Ideally, make sure include table dependencies.
code: paper:   title: Market Design and Moral Behavior   authors:     - Bartling, Björn     - Fehr, Ernst   year: 2024   doi: 10.1257/aer.20221688   journal: American Economic Review  replications:    - id: fig_1     type: figure     description: Example figure     data: data/fig_1.csv     code: code/fig_1.R    - id: tab_1     type: table     description: Example table     data: data/tab_1.csv     code: code/tab_1.R     dependencies:       - dplyr       - gt

title: replicateEverything
text: studies maintained standalone replication packages (instead registry/papers/<folder>/code data), keep paper folder registry replication.yml links package: Local development (monorepo): keep study package sibling folder (e.g. next registry/). replicateEverything looks package_folder monorepo root options(replicateEverything.replication_packages_root) loads devtools::load_all(). Online / published: package GitHub, set package_repo (top-level repo) GitHub slug. YAML changes needed beyond removing ignoring package_folder — install falls back remotes::install_github() sibling found. Optional overrides: paper.package_path: absolute relative path package root options(replicateEverything.replication_packages = list(pkgname = "/path")) options(replicateEverything.replication_packages_root = "/path//monorepo") works: registry still indexes study using DOI metadata replicateEverything reads replication.yml registry folder paper.package present, replicateEverything loads sibling package locally installs package_repo GitHub Shiny continues calling replicateEverything way; package-backed routing handled package layer Required package API linked studies: list_replications() run_replication(id, install_deps = FALSE) load_artifact(id)
code: paper:   doi: https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0278337   title: "Public support for global vaccine sharing in the COVID-19 pandemic: Evidence from Germany"   package: rep1371journalpone0278337   package_folder: rep_10.1371_journal.pone.0278337   package_repo: replicate-anything/rep_10.1371_journal.pone.0278337   package_ref: main repo: replicate-anything/rep_10.1371_journal.pone.0278337

what: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: replicateEverything package provides tools discovering executing computational replications empirical research papers. connects public replication registry containing metadata, replication scripts, processed datasets required reproduce figures tables published studies.

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: typical workflow using package : Retrieve metadata paper using get_doi_metadata(). Search replication registry using search_papers(). Create template contributing replication using create_replication_template(). Inspect available replications using list_replications(). Run single replication using run_replication(). Reproduce results paper using replicate_paper().

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: Retrieve metadata paper: get_doi_metadata("10.1177/00491241211036161") Search registry: search_papers("causal") Create replication template: create_replication_template("10.1177/00491241211036161") List replications: list_replications("10.1177/00491241211036161") Run single replication: run_replication("10.1177/00491241211036161","fig_1") Replicate entire paper: replicate_paper("10.1177/00491241211036161")

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: Replication metadata materials stored public registry: https://github.com/replicate-anything/registry.

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: Maintainer: Vermon Washington vermon.washington@wzb.eu Authors: Macartan Humphreys macartan.humphreys@wzb.eu
